runner_mode.description: Invocation mode of the bench runner: release, dev_moon_run, or unknown.

canonical_performance.description: True when the run is marked as canonical release-runner performance data.

runner_path.description: Resolved runner executable path when known.

measurement_policy.description: Serialized measurement policy summary, currently capturing warmup count, sample count, and process order.

measurement_mode.description: How the benchmark was measured: process-cli for spawned tools or inprocess-engine for the MoonBit in-process engine baseline.

output_write_mode.description: Observed output path mode for the measured row: file for canonical persisted output, stdout_capture for CLI attribution runs, and memory/none for engine-only diagnostic attribution modes.

warmup_count.description: Number of warmup executions performed before measured repeats for this logical row.

wall_ms.description: Rounded wall-clock milliseconds for compatibility and human display.

wall_us.description: Preferred wall-clock measurement in microseconds used for speedup and fixed-overhead calculations.
